context: Tests whether the agent builds an ERP inventory sync service that uses delta polling (modifiedSince), correct available quantity calculation, paginated fetching, Redis caching with the right key pattern and TTL, and skips no-op updates.

checklist.name: Delta sync via modifiedSince
checklist.description: Passes a 'modifiedSince' (or equivalent) timestamp parameter to the ERP inventory query so only changed records are fetched, not the full catalog

checklist.name: Last sync timestamp persistence
checklist.description: Stores and retrieves the last sync timestamp (e.g., in Redis or a database) so subsequent runs can use it as the delta cutoff

checklist.name: Paginated ERP fetch
checklist.description: Iterates through paginated results from the ERP (uses a loop/while with page increment or cursor) rather than assuming a single response

checklist.name: Page size 500
checklist.description: Sets the inventory page size to 500 when querying the ERP

checklist.name: Available qty formula
checklist.description: Calculates available quantity as onHandQuantity minus reservedQuantity minus safetyStock (all three terms subtracted)

checklist.name: Qty clamped to zero
checklist.description: Clamps the calculated available quantity to a minimum of 0 (uses Math.max(0, ...) or equivalent)

checklist.name: Skip unchanged qty
checklist.description: Compares the calculated quantity against the current stored quantity and skips the update if they are equal

checklist.name: Redis cache update
checklist.description: Writes the updated inventory quantity to Redis after a database update

checklist.name: Redis key pattern
checklist.description: Uses a Redis key of the form 'inventory:{productId}' (not SKU-based) for the cached value

checklist.name: Redis TTL 3600
checklist.description: Sets a TTL of 3600 seconds (1 hour) on the Redis inventory cache entry

checklist.name: Sync result tracking
checklist.description: Tracks and logs counts of updated, skipped, and errored items in the sync result
